title: Ecom Express Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Ecom Express Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled E-commerce Executive looking for your next big career move? Ecom Express Holdings Services in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ecom Express Holdings Services:
Ecom Express Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Holdings Services!
